sections.paragraph:
ϰοινωνία, ας, ἡ [κοινωνός]

—1. ‘close association in shared interest’ or ‘shared community life’, fellowship Ac 2:42; 1 Cor 1:9; 2 Cor 13:13; Gal 2:9; Phil 1:5; 2:1; 1 J 1:3, 6f.

—2. ‘practical expression of fellowship through sharing’, fellowship-ping concern Ro 15:26; 2 Cor 8:4; 9:13; Phlm 6; Hb 13:16.

—3. ‘close connection’ (with), w. focus on sacred things 1 Cor 10:16; 2 Cor 6:14; Phil 3:10.
